about.title: MoinsBête
about.subtitle: Replace infinite scroll with rapid learning
steps: Scroll through your daily ideas feed
Discover surprising facts in "Did you know?"
Explore daily images from Wikimedia Commons
Visualize your topics on the mind map
about.subjects_desc: Explore diverse topics: psychology, philosophy, productivity, cognitive science, economics, history, communication, creativity, health and wellness, leadership, and much more.
about.subjects_auto: Topics are automatically detected and added when new content is ingested. You can suggest new topics via the admin interface.
about.sources_desc: MoinsBête content comes from multiple sources: French Wikipedia for ideas and facts, Wiktionary for proverbs, CNRS journal for scientific news, Wikimedia Commons for images, Radio France for audio documentaries, and Pixabay for ambient videos. AI analyzes, summarizes and structures content to deliver clear, digestible ideas.
about.share_desc: Every idea, fact, image, CNRS article, Radio France documentary, Pixabay video and MoinsBête page can be easily shared. Use the share button to send content via email, social networks or copy the link directly.
about.lobby_desc: The Lobby is a community space with two tabs: community-shared favorites and a discussion forum.
about.shared_favorites_desc: Each user can share their favorites with the community. For content to appear in shared favorites, it must first be added to the user's favorites. Favorites include ideas, surprising facts, daily images, Wikimedia and Wiki Loves images.
about.discuss_desc: The Discuss tab is a space to share app improvement ideas, suggest new topics, propose changes or simply chat with the community.
about.saviez_vous_desc: Discover surprising and little-known facts from Wikipedia. Each day, new anecdotes are selected to spark your curiosity. You can save your favorite facts in your favorites and review them via our spaced repetition system.
about.proverbes_desc: Explore a collection of French proverbs and proverbs from around the world. Proverbs are fetched from Wiktionary and verified for authenticity. You can save your favorite proverbs in your favorites and review them via our spaced repetition system.
about.proverbes_nav: Access the Proverbs section to browse by category, search proverbs by keyword, and discover random proverbs. Each proverb can be shared with the community.
about.images_desc: MoinsBête offers two image sections: Image of the Day, a photo selected daily from Wikimedia Commons, and the Wikimedia gallery to explore thousands of free images. Click an image to view it large and share your favorites.
about.collections_desc: Explore curated thematic collections of ideas on specific topics. Each collection gathers the best ideas in a domain for structured and in-depth learning.
about.mind_map_desc: Visualize the connections between your ideas and favorite topics through the interactive mind map. This graphical representation helps you understand how knowledge connects and discover new relationships.
about.srs_desc: MoinsBête uses spaced repetition to help you remember important ideas. When you bookmark an idea, it automatically enters your review cycle.
about.srs_details: Access the Review tab to see ideas at the optimal time. Each idea is rated based on your memorization level: "Again" for forgotten ones, "Hard", "Good" or "Easy" for retained ones. The algorithm automatically adjusts intervals between reviews to optimize long-term memorization.
about.lexical: Lexical Portal — Word of the Day
about.lexical_desc: Discover a new French word each day via the Lexical Portal. Each card presents the TLFi definition, Wiktionary entries, historical etymology with attestation dates, and usage examples in French literature.
about.lexical_access: Access the full lexical portal to search for any word, view detailed definitions and explore its linguistic history. Words can be saved in your Lexicon favorites to return to later.
about.radio_docs_desc: Discover quality audio documentaries from Radio France. Each day, a card proposes a random documentary from our selected collections: history, science, arts, society and more.
about.radio_save: Save your favorite documentaries in your favorites and easily find them in the Radio France Documentaries tab on your favorites page.
about.pixabay_desc: Discover high-quality free ambient videos from Pixabay. You can browse through many categories (Nature, Rain, Sky, Sunset, Forest, Ocean, Space, Landscape, Mountain, Bird) to personalize your learning experience with a soothing touch.
about.pixabay_save: Save your favorite ambient videos in your favorites and easily find them in the Pixabay tab on your favorites page.
about.license_text: This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify it under the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by the Free Software Foundation, either version 3 of the License, or (at your option) any later version.
about.see_license: View the full license at gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html.
about.source_code_text: MoinsBête source code is available on GitHub.
about.source_code_desc: The repository is currently private pending resolution of some security issues.
about.free_text: MoinsBête is free. No ads, no subscription. Just quality learning, without friction.
about.contact_text: To reset your password or share feedback on MoinsBête, email moinsbete@ginies.org.
about.author: Author
about.author_text: MoinsBête was created by {author}. The project is inspired by the Deep Stash philosophy, popularized by Deep Stash, a rapid learning method consisting of collecting and retaining key ideas from books, articles and other knowledge sources.
about.author_goal: The goal is to replace the infinite scroll of social media with active and intentional learning. Each idea is designed to be digested in a few minutes while remaining memorable and actionable. Content is carefully selected and enriched from Wikipedia, CNRS, Wikimedia Commons, Radio France and other quality French sources.
about.infrastructure_text: The MoinsBete service is hosted on a server personally rented by Antoine Giniès for personal use. This service is provided as-is and may be discontinued at any time without prior notice.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.data_collection_desc: MoinsBete collects a minimum of information necessary for the application to function. Your privacy is a priority.
privacy.user_account_desc: email and hashed password are stored in our database. Display name is optional.
privacy.navigation_data_desc: reading history, favorites, followed topics and preferences (CNRS news enabled or not) are stored to personalize your experience.
privacy.activity_tracking_desc: ideas you've read and your active days streak are recorded to provide progress tracking.
privacy.no_analytics_desc: we don't use any third-party analytics tools (Google Analytics, etc.) or tracking.
privacy.no_sharing_desc: your information is not sold or shared with third parties.
privacy.no_ads_desc: there are no ads or advertising tracking.
privacy.cookies_desc: MoinsBete uses a session cookie (JWT) to maintain your connection. This cookie is necessary for authentication and contains no personally identifiable information.
privacy.cookie_expiry: The cookie is stored locally on your device and expires after 30 days of inactivity. You can sign out at any time to remove it.
privacy.storage_desc: All data is stored in a local database (SQLite/libsql) hosted on our infrastructure. Files are processed in volatile memory and are not uploaded to external servers.
privacy.security_desc: Passwords are hashed before storage. The session uses secure JWT tokens with CSRF verification. Data is stored on our dedicated infrastructure.
privacy.your_rights_desc: You can view and manage your data via your profile page. For any questions about your personal data, contact us at moinsbete@ginies.org.
privacy.policy_changes_desc: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected by the new update date at the top of this page.
privacy.contact_us_desc: For any questions or suggestions regarding this privacy policy, don't hesitate to contact us.

admin.cartes_desc: Enable or disable cards globally on the site
